basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Relaxation as per AIIMS/DST rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. / 3 years diploma in Engineering & Technology from a recognized university or Equivalent.
qualification.details: B.Sc. / 3 years diploma in Engineering & Technology from a recognized university or Equivalent.

selection_process: Application via Email/Google Form Shortlisting Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
